title: Die Sterne and Der Mond
wikitext:
[]: Die Sterne and Der Mond             Quote Post by Razeil100 » Sun May 11, 2008 11:30 pm What the difference? I got Die Sterne today and I was wondering if Der Mond was Manga art work or just more miscallanious Art from the show?

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Mon May 12, 2008 12:17 am Sterne=Stars Mond=Moon Now you know.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon May 12, 2008 12:51 am ZapalacX wrote: Now you know.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon May 12, 2008 12:56 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: ZapalacX wrote: Now you know.

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Mon May 12, 2008 1:00 am Die Sterne is a huge collection of miscellaneous artwork. Der Mond is various Eva artwork specifically by Sadamoto.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon May 12, 2008 1:22 am Sachi_13 wrote: And knowledge is power!

[]:             Quote Post by Razeil100 » Mon May 12, 2008 9:58 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: Sachi_13 wrote: And knowledge is power!

[]:             Quote Post by Razeil100 » Mon May 12, 2008 9:59 am ZapalacX wrote: Sterne=Stars Mond=Moon Now you know.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon May 12, 2008 11:00 am Razeil100 wrote: G.I. Joe.

[]:             Quote Post by Razeil100 » Tue May 13, 2008 12:45 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: Razeil100 wrote: G.I. Joe.
